profile.name: GRIMA Florian
profile.summary: I design and ship machine learning systems that stay useful after the demo: production pipelines, applied research, MLOps foundations, and product-facing AI experiences.

hero.title: Where dreams rise through the silence.
hero.description: I build machine learning products for deep thinkers, bold creators, and quiet rebels. From experimentation to deployment, I focus on systems that are sharp, reliable, and made to last.

studies.title: Master's Degree in Artificial Intelligence
studies.description: Advanced coursework in machine learning, deep learning, data engineering, and optimization, with a strong focus on turning theoretical models into practical systems.

studies.title: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science
studies.description: Built a strong software foundation across algorithms, distributed systems, mathematics, and full-stack engineering.

careers.title: ML Engineer
careers.description: Designing and deploying ML workflows, inference services, data pipelines, and AI-assisted features with an emphasis on observability, latency, and maintainability.

careers.title: Data & AI Engineer
careers.description: Worked on model training, evaluation, backend integration, and analytics, helping bridge experimentation with production delivery.
